calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Judgment Against Shields And Hunter
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Stephe M. Williams, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Starr King Open Space.
Richard G. J. McDerby sworn and examinded on behalf of the Plaitiff.
Court ordered defendants Does 1 - 100 inclusive dismissed.

No appearance by defaulted defendants Susanne K. Shields and Ralph E. Hunter, jointly and severally
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $130,000.00
Pre-Judgment interest at the annual rate of 10% $18,417.00
Costs $780.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $149,197.00
Judgment signed in open court.
